caption: The video features a man performing on stage, playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with colorful embroidery. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a cozy or intimate venue. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems engaged, with some individuals looking attentively towards the performer. The atmosphere conveys a sense of warmth and connection, as the man delivers his performance with focus and emotion. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance.
